# wordpress_plugins (Data Source)

Data source for retrieving a list of installed WordPress plugins.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `plugins` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--plugins))

<a id="nestedatt--plugins"></a>
### Nested Schema for `plugins`

Read-Only:

- `author_uri` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `network_only` (Boolean)
- `plugin` (String)
- `plugin_uri` (String)
- `requires_php` (String)
- `requires_wp` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `textdomain` (String)
- `version` (String)
